joke:
Why don't skeletons fight each other?  

They don’t have the guts.

Why don't scientists trust atoms?  

Because they make up everything!

Why don't eggs tell secrets?  

They'd crack under pressure!

Why don't pirates ever get lost?  

Because they always follow their *arr*!

Why don't paper towels ever get invited to parties?  

Because they’re too absorbent!
